name: facade_v1_p1
description: Pass 1: Convert architectural facade sketches to photorealistic building exteriors
intended_image_type: Building facade sketches, elevation drawings, exterior architectural sketches
pass_purpose: Translate facade sketch to photorealistic building exterior while preserving windows, doors, proportions

prompt_templates.positive: photorealistic building facade, modern architecture, detailed windows and doors, realistic materials (stone, glass, metal), natural daylight, architectural photography, high quality
prompt_templates.negative: drawing, sketch, monochrome, engraving, illustration, flat, plastic, CGI, render, distorted proportions, malformed windows, text, watermark

expected_failure_modes: Window/door positions may shift if denoise too high
notes: Facade presets need precise geometry control. ControlNet critical for window/door alignment.
